g.text: FSM states: IN_STRING -> MAYBE_END -> (back to IN_STRING or exit)

text.tspan: Maximal Munch Rule: always consume the
longest valid token. '<=' is preferred over '<' + '='.

g.text: '!' + other | peek!= | TOK_ERROR (! alone is invalid SQL)
All resolved with exactly 1 char lookahead (peek without consume)

div.p: SELECT 1 -- note Result: comment skipped, no token emitted
SELECT 10 - 42 Tokens: INT(10), MINUS, INT(42) Parser decides unary vs binary
'it''s ok' String value: it's ok Token: TOK_STRING
'missing end Error at line 1, col 1: unterminated string
a <> b Tokens: ID(a), NE, ID(b) Same as !=
